scripts.relayer-v2:sepolia: docker compose -f relayer-v2/compose/docker-compose.yml --env-file relayer-v2/compose/sepolia.env --env-file relayer-v2/compose/secrets.env pull && docker compose -f relayer-v2/compose/docker-compose.yml --env-file relayer-v2/compose/sepolia.env --env-file relayer-v2/compose/secrets.env up -d
scripts.test: npm --prefix relayer-v2/actor test && npm --prefix relayer-v2/watcher test
